title: T.N. Assembly polls: Musiri residents flag water, roads and livelihood issues
description: Musiri, an agriculturally fertile constituency on the banks of the Cauvery in Tiruchi district, is known for its rich history, vibrant farming economy and traditional crafts. As the State Assembly elections approach, residents point to challenges such as groundwater depletion, irrigation planning, road connectivity, water supply and the future of cottage industries, even as agriculture and banana cultivation continue to sustain livelihoods.
